text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 23:17 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

The deployable application composes the product-neutral Product Shell and independently maintained Object Storage Product Extension, owns browser/platform and documentation integration, and injects separate typed Admin API and optional S3 HeadObject clients. Operational report screens preserve provider-not-configured responses; report, audit, metrics, trace, recovery, garbage-collection, and scrub providers are outside this browser component boundary.
C3 Component: Object Storage Admin Browser Application
